73968.subject: RE: Переклад.
73968.body:
Добрий день!
Можемо забезпечити переклади, але попередньо рекомендуємо проконсультуватись з церквою,  де буде проводитись обряд вінчання які документи необхідні для проведення цієї процедури.  

Адреса офісу:

 <https://www.google.com/maps/search/Torysk%C3%A1+3+040+11+Ko%C5%A1ice?entry=gmail&source=g> Toryská 3

 <https://www.google.com/maps/search/Torysk%C3%A1+3+040+11+Ko%C5%A1ice?entry=gmail&source=g> 040 11 Košice

2-й поверх, 110  кабінет

Робочі години – 8:00 – 16:00, пн-пт.

З повагою,

UA preklady s.r.o.

+421918635854





 

 

From: Oleg Novosadov <novosadovoleg@gmail.com> 
Sent: Tuesday, June 2, 2026 8:36 PM
To: info@ua-preklady.sk
Subject: Переклад.

 

Доброго дня, 

 

Цікавить переклад документів для вінчання у Словаччині.

 

Дякую. 

 

Гарного дня.

73967.subject: Google is changing our lives again
73967.body:
AI NOW & BEYOND

Автор: AI NOW & BEYOND


Автор: AI NOW & BEYOND

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/google-changing-our-lives-again-gptai-l511f?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3Bmi%2BVtTruTWCKvrj7Ej5rtA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2_mpGApeL9OYg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mpxnojx5~mm-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mpxnojx5-mm
  
Today in AI NOW & BEYOND 🔥 Are you betting on a single AI answer for high-stakes decisions? Google Just Turned Workspace Into an AI Agent Platform Too Important to Miss Trending AI Tools Are you betting on a single AI answer for high-stakes decisions? AI is brilliant for casual work. But for high-stakes research and decisions, a confident-sounding answer from one model is a risk not worth taking. Cuey sends one prompt to ChatGPT, Claude & Gemini in one tab. Spot hallucinations. Compare reasoning side-by-side. Get a second opinion so you don't get burned by the first one. Add to Chrome – Free Google Just Turned Workspace Into an AI Agent Platform Gemini 3.5, Gemini Omni, Antigravity, Spark, and CodeMender bring agentic AI deeper into Google Cloud and Workspace Google Cloud announced a major set of AI updates from Google I/O, bringing new models, personal agents, developer tools, Workspace features, and security agents directly to Gemini Enterprise, Google Workspace, and the Agent Platform. Key Points: Gemini 3.5 Flash: Google’s latest model starts with Gemini 3.5 Flash, built for agentic workflows, coding, and long-horizon tasks with strong speed and lower cost. Gemini Omni: A new multimodal model for generating and editing video from text, audio, image, and video inputs, aimed at enterprise creative and media workflows. Google Antigravity expands: Antigravity 2.0 desktop app and CLI bring agentic development to enterprises, helping teams orchestrate coding, asset creation, QA, and deployment workflows. Gemini Spark: A new 24/7 personal AI agent for Gemini Enterprise that can work in the background across Workspace, connectors, and the web while asking for approval on high-risk actions. Workspace AI upgrades: Google introduced Google Pics for image generation and editing inside Workspace apps, plus new voice features in Gmail, Docs, and Keep. Managed Agents API: Developers can now build and run custom agents inside secure Google-hosted environments with governance, privacy, and security protections. CodeMender security agent: Google is integrating CodeMender into Agent Platform to help identify, test, and fix code vulnerabilities with developer approval. Why It Matters: Google is turning Cloud and Workspace into an agentic enterprise platform where AI agents can build software, manage workflows, create media, monitor systems, fix code, and support em

73960.subject: Here Are Donald Trump’s 10 Worst Stock Trades Of 2026
73960.body:
Forbes P.M.

Автор: Forbes


Автор: Forbes

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/here-donald-trumps-10-worst-stock-trades-2026-forbes-magazine-oaymc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BgaD3pF6vQ7%2B3idf91qkqEQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2iLBkPP-vaOsg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mpx54u9k~16-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mpx54u9k-16
  
Good evening, Donald Trump has made many bad bets over the years: Casinos, airlines, hotels and an ill-fated “university” all famously make the list. Some of his investments follow suit, as revealed by a Forbes examination of the president’s biggest trades. Here are the 10 stock purchases that we estimate have lost Trump the most money this year. Thanks for reading! Kris Kornbluth Assistant Editor, Platforms & Curation More Recommended Reads Chona Kasinger via Bloomberg; Jamel Toppin for Forbes Forbes' Iconoclast 50 List: Leaders In Finance, Business, Technology These are the billionaires, founders and executives defying convention to rewrite the rules of global business. Nikolas Kokovlis/NurPhoto via Getty Images Meta’s AI Gave Hackers Keys To An Obama Instagram Account The attacks show how AI agents—even from large, established companies—can be tricked.
Приєднатися до обговорення
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/here-donald-trumps-10-worst-stock-trades-2026-forbes-magazine-oaymc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BgaD3pF6vQ7%2B3idf91qkqEQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2iLBkPP-vaOsg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_-null-fz96fz~mpx54u9k~16-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mpx54u9k-16
  
      

----------------------------------------

Це повідомлення е-поштою адресовано учасникові Oleh Novosadov (I am 36 years old, and I am passionate about the world of cryptocurrencies and blockchain technologies. My professional interests include investing in cryptocurrencies, exploring blockchain, Web3, and the DeFi sector.)
